findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 32. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: Page number artifacts in HTML content
findings.evidence: Page numbers appear as content in the HTML: '2020' (4x). These should be removed during conversion.

findings.description: Filamentous algae percentage incorrectly stated as 49% in the text, but this matches the PDF's Table 1. However, the text on page 4 says 'documented at 24 (49%) sample points' — the 49% is from Table 1 but the point count is 24, while Figure 9 caption says 49 sample sites. There is an inconsistency in the source PDF itself (24 in Table 2 vs 49 in Figure 9 caption), which the HTML reproduces differently in different locations.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 text: 'documented at 24 (49%) sample points'; PDF Figure 9 caption: 'found at 49 sample sites'; Table 2 shows 24. The HTML faithfully reproduces these inconsistencies from the source. This is actually NOT a conversion error - retracting this finding.

findings.description: Duplicate <main> elements in HTML structure - there is a <main> wrapping everything and then another <main> element nested inside after the header, creating invalid nesting.
findings.evidence: HTML has <body><main><header>...</header><main>...</main></main></body> — two nested main elements.

findings.description: Figure 12 (bar chart) is not rendered as an image in the HTML — instead its axis labels and legend text are presented as plain text. The chart visualization is lost.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 18 contains a bar chart (Figure 12) showing SAV % occurrence. HTML renders this as plain text: '100%
80%
% Occurence
60%...' rather than as an image.

findings.description: The text refers to 'slender spikerush' in some places and 'proliferating spikerush' in others — but this matches the source PDF which also uses both terms. No conversion error.
